languages.text: "Вот уж отчаянн{mf|ый|ая} вы, Ваша Светлость... я соберу гарнизон, мы проверим оборону и пойдем вслед за вами. Искупление для одного!"
"You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"
languages.original_text: "Вот уж отчаянн{mf|ый|ая} вы, Ваша Светлость... я соберу гарнизон, мы проверим оборону и пойдем вслед за вами. Искупление для одного!"

traits.locale_text: "You are truly daring, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison, we'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"
"You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"
"Not the timid sort, are you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison, we'll check the defences and follow you. Freedom for the one!"
"You are truly daring, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison, we'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"
"You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"

languages.text: 「臆するお方ではありませんな、{mf|閣下|閣下}……守備隊を招集し、防備を点検して後に続きます。一なる者に自由あれ！」
languages.original_text: "Not the timid sort, are you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison, we'll check the defences and follow you. Freedom for the one!"

traits.locale_text: 「臆するお方ではありませんな、{mf|閣下|閣下}……守備隊を招集し、防備を点検して後に続きます。一なる者に自由あれ！」

languages.text: « Vous avez bien du courage, Votre Seigneurie... Je vais rassembler la garnison. Nous vous suivrons sous peu, après avoir inspecté les défenses. Expiation pour un seul ! »
languages.original_text: "You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez bien du courage, Votre Seigneurie... Je vais rassembler la garnison. Nous vous suivrons sous peu, après avoir inspecté les défenses. Expiation pour un seul ! »

languages.text: "Gerçekten pek cesursunuz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri? Garnizonu toplayacağım. Savunmaları kontrol edeceğiz ve sonrasında sizi takip edeceğiz. Sona kalana kefaret!"
languages.original_text: "You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekten pek cesursunuz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri? Garnizonu toplayacağım. Savunmaları kontrol edeceğiz ve sonrasında sizi takip edeceğiz. Sona kalana kefaret!"

languages.text: "Ihr habt wirklich Mut, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... Ich lasse die Garnison antreten. Wir prüfen die Verteidigungen und folgen Euch in Kürze. Sühne für den Einzelnen!"
languages.original_text: "You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt wirklich Mut, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... Ich lasse die Garnison antreten. Wir prüfen die Verteidigungen und folgen Euch in Kürze. Sühne für den Einzelnen!"

languages.text: «Es verdaderamente valiente, mi{mf|lord|lady}... Reuniré a la guarnición. Comprobaremos las defensas y l{mf|e|a} seguiremos en breve. ¡Expiación para el último!».
languages.original_text: "You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: «Es verdaderamente valiente, mi{mf|lord|lady}... Reuniré a la guarnición. Comprobaremos las defensas y l{mf|e|a} seguiremos en breve. ¡Expiación para el último!».

languages.text: “您当真是勇气的化身，大人……我这就集结驻军。我们先去检查防线，随后就跟上您。为了一人之赎！”
languages.original_text: "You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"

traits.locale_text: “您当真是勇气的化身，大人……我这就集结驻军。我们先去检查防线，随后就跟上您。为了一人之赎！”
